purpose: Snapshot whole-site behavior so /arise fix waves can be diffed against a known-good state. The Mar 17-19 incident shipped 16 fixes in 48h and broke search, OAuth, blog images, and the endo survey for 48h. Phase 1 captures the regression-detection surface so a repeat is impossible.

summary.e2e_failed_signature: notice block links to bridge page and FACTS (3 browsers)

summary.captured: status + content-type/cache-control/cf-cache-status/etag/location + body sha + json shape per URL

summary.type_distribution: 8 SpeakableSpecification, 5 BreadcrumbList, 5 MedicalWebPage, 4 Article, 3 FAQPage, plus DefinedTerm, ItemList, WebPage

summary.note: networkidle timeout on long-poll pages; baseline state

diff_strategy.fast_diff_after_fix: compare http/http-baseline.json status_codes + body sha + agent-surface byte sha + d1 row counts + arise-scan high count. Any drift = investigate.
diff_strategy.deep_diff: regenerate visual/, search/, schema/ baselines and use scripts/diff-baseline.mjs (TODO Phase 5) to surface differences.
diff_strategy.ae_diff: after each TIER A fix, re-run ae/by-functional-route.json query for last 4-24h and compare error_summary.total_errors against this baseline.

next_phases.phase_2: Discovery: /arise standard sweeps + /arise --deep persona traces produce a unified finding ledger (no fixes shipped)
next_phases.phase_3: Triage: every finding scored against fix-risk matrix; TIER A/B/C/D + 'do not fix' list assigned
next_phases.phase_4: Fix waves: per-surface, per-day, max 3 fixes per commit, full proof-gate suite per fix
